inputs.label: Current Training Max
inputs.businessContext: The lifter's current one-rep max for the exercise in kg.

businessContext_i18n.en: The lifter's current one-rep max for the exercise in kg.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sporcunun egzersiz için kg cinsinden mevcut bir tekrar maksimumu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das aktuelle One-Rep-Max des Hebers für die Übung in kg.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Répétition maximale actuelle du haltérophile pour l'exercice en kg.
businessContext_i18n.es: Repetición máxima actual del levantador para el ejercicio en kg.

inputs.label: Current Average Intensity
inputs.businessContext: Average training intensity as percentage of 1RM.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average training intensity as percentage of 1RM.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Intensité moyenne d'entraînement en pourcentage de la 1RM.
businessContext_i18n.es: Intensidad media de entrenamiento como porcentaje del 1RM.

inputs.label: Current Weekly Volume Load
inputs.businessContext: Total weekly volume load in kilograms (sets x reps x weight).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total weekly volume load in kilograms (sets x reps x weight).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kilogram cinsinden toplam haftalık hacim yükü (set x tekrar x ağırlık).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte wöchentliche Volumenbelastung in Kilogramm (Sätze x Wiederholungen x Gewicht).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Charge volumique hebdomadaire totale en kilogrammes (séries x répétitions x poids).
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen de carga semanal total en kilogramos (series x repeticiones x peso).

inputs.label: Deload Duration
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the deload phase in weeks.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the deload phase in weeks.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yük azaltma aşamasının hafta cinsinden süresi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de la phase de décharge en semaines.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración de la fase de descarga en semanas.

inputs.label: Intensity Reduction
inputs.businessContext: Reduction in intensity percentage points during deload.

businessContext_i18n.en: Reduction in intensity percentage points during deload.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yük azaltma sırasında yoğunluk yüzde puanındaki azalma.
businessContext_i18n.de: Reduktion der Intensität in Prozentpunkten während der Entlastung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Réduction en points de pourcentage de l'intensité pendant la décharge.
businessContext_i18n.es: Reducción en puntos porcentuales de intensidad durante la descarga.

inputs.label: Volume Reduction
inputs.businessContext: Percentage reduction in volume load during deload.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage reduction in volume load during deload.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yük azaltma sırasında hacim yükündeki yüzde azalma.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentuale Reduktion der Volumenbelastung während der Entlastung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Réduction en pourcentage de la charge volumique pendant la décharge.
businessContext_i18n.es: Reducción porcentual en la carga de volumen durante la descarga.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
